data.body: Extract get_red_zone_line_number, parse_failing_tests_from_output, get_test_line_number from record-test-status.sh into tests/lib/red-zone.sh. Add read_red_markers_by_test_file() that scans .test-index and builds test_file->marker associative array. Update record-test-status.sh to source red-zone.sh. Path resolution via BASH_SOURCE.
